mapper.select: SELECT account_id, email, password_hash, role_type, last_login_at, created_id, created_at, updated_id, updated_at, deleted_id, deleted_at FROM TB_NTALK_USER_ACCOUNT WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NTALK_USER_ACCOUNT SET last_login_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
